generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: pixel-paragraph-words-inverse
Description: A paragraph component with pixel font and highlighted specific words/phrases in a custom font.
Style: custom, pixel, inverse, font
Interactions: no-interaction
Tags: paragraph, font, text, custom, style

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// registry/default/ui/pixel-paragraph-words-inverse.tsx
/**
 * @module PixelParagraphInverse
 *
 * Renders a paragraph where the base text is in a pixel font and
 * specific words / phrases escape into sans or mono.
 *
 * This is the inverse of `PixelParagraph`: instead of highlighting
 * words *in* pixel, everything is pixel *except* the specified words.
 *
 * Setup — Geist Pixel Fonts with Tailwind CSS
 * =============================================
 *
 * All Geist fonts can be used through
